things.name: Bazaruto Archipelago Diving
things.description: UNESCO Marine Park with dugongs, manta rays and whale sharks

things.name: CFM Railway Station
things.description: Gustave Eiffel-designed 1910 colonial railway station - Maputo's architectural icon

things.name: Natural History Museum
things.description: Collection of Mozambique wildlife including a display of elephant foetuses

things.name: Maputo Fortress (Fortaleza)
things.description: Portuguese fortress from 1781 housing a military history museum

things.name: Casa de Ferro (Iron House)
things.description: Prefabricated iron house by Gustave Eiffel assembled in 1892

things.name: Mercado Central
things.description: Maputo's main market with cashews, prawns, capulana fabrics and drums

things.name: Ponta do Ouro Dolphin Swim
things.description: Swim with wild resident dolphins in the warm Indian Ocean near the South Africa border

things.name: Polana Neighbourhood Art Galleries
things.description: Maputo's thriving contemporary Mozambican art scene

things.name: Municipal Market (Mercado Municipal)
things.description: Restored 1901 market hall with fresh produce and traditional crafts

things.name: Piri-Piri Prawns
things.description: Mozambique's famous flame-grilled prawns with piri-piri chilli sauce and bread
